notes: settings.json registration BLOCKED: teo-apply-edit cannot cleanly insert a new top-level hook block into settings.json JSON structure via line-level anchor patching (no unique anchor at the insertion point line). Human must manually add the pre-bash-write-guard.sh hook entry under the Bash matcher.

Test helper hook_bash_with_bypass required bug fix: original spec used VAR=val cmd1 | cmd2 pipeline prefix which does not propagate env var to cmd2. Fixed with export + unset pattern. Behavioral contract preserved.
Implementation choice: Option B (new dedicated hook pre-bash-write-guard.sh). Mirrors pre-edit-write-guard.sh structure exactly.
